name: golang-github-goccmack-gocc-dev
title: golang-github-goccmack-gocc-dev
description:
Go lexer and parser generator (library)
Gocc generates lexer-parser pairs or stand-alone DFAs or parsers from
a Backus-Naur form (BNF). The generated lexers are deterministic
finite automata (DFAs), recognising regular languages. The generated
parsers are pushdown automata (PDAs), recognising LR(1) languages.
Optional LR(1) conflict handling automatically resolves shift/reduce
and reduce/reduce conflicts.
.
This package provides Gocc as a Go library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-goccmack-gocc-dev because Go lexer and parser generator (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-goccmack-gocc-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-goccmack-gocc-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-goccmack-gocc-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
